name: CarParts.com, Inc.
business: CarParts.com is a technology-enabled eCommerce company that sells aftermarket automotive parts and accessories to individual consumers and professional customers through its owned digital channels, mobile app, and third-party online marketplaces. The company operates four distribution centers and uses both stock-and-ship and drop-ship fulfillment methods.

exposures.sentence: We are a technology-enabled eCommerce company dedicated to simplifying how drivers and professional customers shop for aftermarket automotive parts and accessories.

In June 2024, we opened a new state-of-the-art fulfillment center in Las Vegas, Nevada. This semi-automated facility is designed to improve service levels, support faster delivery to the West Coast, reduce last-mile transportation costs, and expand product availability.
In the fall of 2025, we launched Spark, our AI-powered shopping assistant, designed to help customers more easily discover products, navigate fitment, and complete purchases with greater confidence.
Security threats, such as ransomware attacks, to our IT infrastructure could expose us to liability, business interruption and significant damages, and may damage our reputation and business.

We depend on third-party delivery services, for both inbound and outbound shipping, to deliver our products to our distribution centers and subsequently to our customers on a timely and consistent basis, and any deterioration in our relationship with any one of these third parties or increases in the fees that they charge could harm our reputation and adversely affect our business and financial condition.

catalysts.event: Opened new state-of-the-art fulfillment center in Las Vegas, Nevada
catalysts.sentence: In June 2024, we opened a new state-of-the-art fulfillment center in Las Vegas, Nevada.
In the fall of 2025, we launched Spark, our AI-powered shopping assistant, designed to help customers more easily discover products, navigate fitment, and complete purchases with greater confidence.

catalysts.event: Secured strategic investment from ZongTeng Group, A-Premium, and CDH Investments
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, we secured a strategic investment from ZongTeng Group, A-Premium, and CDH Investments to support an expanded mechanical and performance parts assortment, enhanced fulfillment capabilities, and continued operational improvements.

catalysts.event: Issued Convertible Notes with aggregate principal amount of $25,000
catalysts.sentence: On September 8, 2025, we entered into a Purchase Agreement with certain investors, pursuant to which we issued Convertible Notes with an aggregate principal amount of $25,000.

catalysts.event: Sold 100% of Philippines offshore operations subsidiary to a third party
catalysts.sentence: On January 27, 2026, we sold 100% of the issued and outstanding shares of our Philippines offshore operations (subsidiary) to a third party.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. Auto Care Association estimated that overall revenue from online sales of auto parts and accessories would reach over $27 billion by 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. Auto Care Association estimated that overall revenue from online sales of auto parts and accessories would reach over $27 billion by 2028.
